headline: Colgate Palmolive (CL) Valuation Check After Deutsche Bank Upgrade And Growth Narrative Reassessment
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is back in focus after Deutsche Bank upgraded the stock to Buy, citing the company’s franchise quality, long-term 2030 Strategy investments, and resilience during periods of market volatility. See our latest analysis for Colgate-Palmolive. Colgate-Palmolive’s 1-day share price return of 1.71% and 7.82% 90-day share price return sit against a 13.53% 30-day pullback. The 1-year total shareholder return of a 6.25% decline contrasts with 3-year and 5-year gains above 20%...
